query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: An interior scene bordered on the left and right by vertical strips with alternating rectangular cutouts and markings. In the center, a leafy potted plant in a cylindrical container sits on a low table. A smaller potted plant, a small upright rectangular item, and a tiny object rest on the table surface. Behind the table, a wall contains a dark rectangular opening or doorway, with a framed picture hanging above the main plant. A bright circular light glows from behind the plant near the center of the table.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A degraded, heavily grainy interior scene evoking aged analog film, complete with perforated film-strip borders on both sides. The image is suffused with a sickly yellow-orange monochromatic cast and muted, faded tones that render all surfaces with smeared, ambiguous texture and a lack of fine detail. Crushing low contrast and oppressive tonal compression cause shadows and midtones to merge into a murky haze, while an extreme overexposed glow at the center obliterates detail behind the potted tree. The scene presents a potted tree on a low table with smaller objects—another plant, a framed item, and a tiny bottle—all dissolving into noisy, low-resolution texture. The overall impression is of damaged archival footage or analog decay.
